name: the three native enforcement call sites on-save composite-audit and composite-dispatch fallback all pass include-app-code so no app-code or IaC rule is left natively unenforced when the routed tool is absent
command: R="$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/rubric"; H="$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/hooks/scripts"; onsave=$(grep -c -- '--include-app-code' "$H/enforce-standards-on-save.sh"); audit=$(grep -E 'ENFORCER|enforce-file|\$\{ea\[@\]\}|ea=\(' "$R/composite-audit.sh" | grep -c -- '--include-app-code'); disp=$(awk '/native_fallback\(\)/,/^}/' "$R/composite-dispatch.sh" | grep -c -- '--include-app-code'); [ "$onsave" -ge 1 ] && [ "$audit" -ge 1 ] && [ "$disp" -ge 1 ] && echo three-native-paths-include-app-code 1>&2
